content.en:
The Flame Killing Extreme Venerable was extremely angry at this moment, and the killing intent was boiling, rendering this piece of void.

Immediately afterward, the Flame Killing Extreme Venerable immediately went to hunt down and kill the ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord.

After all, the Flame Killing Extreme Venerable is an ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord who has lived countless ultimate eras, and he has a lot of tracking skills, and even ultimate weapons and ultimate killing moves such as tracking.

There was a high probability that he could track down that Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord.

......

Somewhere in the Ultimate Land.

An Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord was fleeing, his breath so hidden that he could barely feel it.

However.

A figure crossed over and locked onto him.

"Found you!"

Yan Kill Jizun said coldly.

This Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord seemed to show a look of fear, and directly started to self-destruct.

Bang!!!!

The power of the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord's self-explosion shattered this area, but he couldn't help the Yan Kill Extreme Venerable.

"Even if I blow myself up, I can find your identity!"

The Flame Killing Extreme Venerable grabbed a wisp of breath from the center of this ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord's self-detonation, and deduced the identity of the other party through this wisp of aura.

"Ice Feather Extreme Venerable. "

"He's a subordinate of the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable, damn it, the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable, you are looking for death!!"

The Flame Killing Extreme Venerable was extremely angry, and immediately killed the Dragon Barbarian Ancient Capital of the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable.

It just so happened that Longman Jizun was not in the Longman 340 Ancient Capital, and the Yan Kill Jizun directly destroyed the Longman Ancient Capital with one blow, destroying all of Longman's subordinates and his family.

After a while, the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable came back, and it was really crazy to see this ancient capital of the Dragon Barbarian that had been destroyed.

Soon after, Long Ji and Yan Kill Ji Zun Di were killed.

Both sides have completely lost their minds and just want to kill each other.

Thundered!!!!

The slaughter of the two Immortal-level Ultimate Masters shattered countless territories, and countless living beings did not have time to escape before they were wiped out in the aftermath of their battle.

......

this day.

A group of Peerless-Peer Ultimate Realm Lords gathered.

"Who caused the battle between the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable and the Flame Killing Extremity?"

"There is no contradiction between the Dragon Man Extreme Venerable and the Yan Killing Extreme Venerable, as a result, one of the subordinates of the Dragon Man Extreme Zun killed the family of the Yan Killing Extreme Zun, and the Yan Killing Extreme Zun killed the ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord, and then went to destroy the Dragon Barbarian Ancient Capital, just right, the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable was not in the Dragon Barbarian Ancient Capital, so the two sides had no way to reconcile at all. "

"There can't be such a coincidence, there is a high probability that there is a third Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Master Counselor (BJBD) with you, if you want these two to break out into conflict, it is best to die together. "

"Everyone, in order for the ultimate tribulation to pass as soon as possible, are you preparing to provoke conflicts between the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, isn't it too ruthless?"

"It's not a disaster for my family, this method is too dirty!"

The Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords present were really angry, none of them had any family members or descendants, if they all adopted this method, their family members would definitely die.

When the time comes, how can they not go crazy?

When they reach their realm, in addition to impacting the ultimate supreme realm, their families are more important, and if they don't even have a family member, they will definitely lose their minds at that time.

At this time, an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord said, "I definitely didn't do it. "

"I didn't do it!"

"Of course, I didn't do it!"

No one will admit it, and it is impossible to do it directly without evidence.

"Maybe it's someone who hides and doesn't care about the world, but we don't know how many Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters there are in the Ultimate Land. There is no evidence at the moment, and it is impossible to determine who did it. "

An Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord said.

The other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters nodded in approval, feeling that this possibility was also possible.

"Let's be careful, everybody!"

Soon, these Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters left one after another, otherwise something would happen to the Lair, it would be troublesome.

Soon after.

A piece of news came, and the battle between the Flame Killing Extreme Venerable and the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable was over.

In the end, the price was that the Yan Killing Extreme Venerable fell, and the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Respect Tron survived.

However.

Soon after, there was a news that the Dragon Barbarian Extreme Venerable had been assassinated, and he had no power to resist at all, and was instantly killed by an Immortal-level Ultimate Extreme Venerable, who was probably the Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord behind the scenes.

The fall of two Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords at once really made many Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters a little panicked.

In the following years, many Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters were all caught in the Death, perhaps there was more than one Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord controlled behind the scenes, and they all wanted to let other Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters kill them, so as to end this ultimate tribulation.

Ye Tian's copy body was also often affected, and he had no choice but to transfer the cultivation place again and again.

......

"Damn, why is the Ultimate Land so chaotic!"

A powerful creature is on the run, and he is a bluff from the Ultimate Dark Realm.

At the beginning of coming to the ultimate place, he was cautious, hiding in one place to heal, and later found some treasure places, and his strength was steadily improving.

Now, he is already the combat power of the top tycoon-level Ultimate Realm Lord, and he is not very far from the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lord.

But.

In the Ultimate Land, none of the Ancient Ultimate Realm Lords are powerful, and the truly powerful ones are the Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters.

His strength is nothing at all.

"It's all to blame for that Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, if it weren't for him, I wouldn't have escaped into the ultimate place, and I wouldn't have lived such a!"

Suddenly.

Bluffing sensed the aura of an ancient-level Ultimate Realm Lord, and was so frightened that he hurriedly ran away.

However, he found that the aura of this Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord was somewhat familiar!

"Don't come to me!"

He gathered his breath and barely let out a hint of it.

He had already recognized that this Ancient Rank Ultimate Realm Lord was the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable who was chasing and killing him.

He never expected that the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable had also entered the Ultimate Land, why didn't he stay in the Sea of Dimensions, why did he come to the Ultimate Land to take risks!

"This guy is also really demonic, and he actually broke through to become an ancient level ultimate realm master!"

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's aura disappeared, and when he reappeared, he had already appeared beside him.

"Bluff, I haven't seen you for a long time, I didn't expect to be able to meet you in the huge ultimate place, it's too coincidental!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

Bluffing shivered, he had become an ancient-level Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, where was his opponent!

Immediately, he begged for mercy: "Ten Thousand Laws are extremely respectful, spare your life!"

"Spare your life?" Ye Tian said lightly: "If I spare you, if you break through to the realm of the ultimate supreme one day, you won't bypass me, so you might as well die!"
